extract: Decidueye (Japanese: ジュナイパー Junaiper) is a dual-type Grass/Ghost Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It evolves from Dartrix starting at level 34. It is the final form of Rowlet. In Hisui, Decidueye has a dual-type Grass/Fighting regional form. It evolves from Dartrix starting at level 36. It is the final form of Rowlet in the Hisui region. Along with Charizard, Pikachu, and Talonflame, Decidueye is one of the first Pokémon available through the Unite Licenses in Pokémon UNITE as of version 1.12.1.2.
